description_long: This handbag features a structured, trapezoidal silhouette with a prominent floral pattern in pink and white hues on its main body. The bag is equipped with two short, rounded handles in a muted pink color, attached to the top of the bag with metallic hardware. The side panels are a contrasting gray, adding visual interest and dimension to the design. The front of the bag displays a rectangular patch with a subtle logo or emblem, surrounded by the floral print. The overall construction appears to be of synthetic leather or coated canvas, with reinforced stitching along the edges. The interior is likely lined with fabric, and the bag is designed to be both stylish and functional for everyday urban use.
description: A structured handbag with pink floral print, gray side panels, and two short pink handles, featuring a front logo patch.
description_view_0: Side view showing the narrow profile, pink handles, and a glimpse of the floral pattern.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the floral print, central logo patch, and both pink handles.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with the same narrow profile and handle details.
description_view_3: Rear view, similar to the front but without the logo patch, showing the floral pattern and handles.
attribute_brand_logo: Rectangular patch on the front center, possibly with embossed or printed logo, surrounded by floral pattern.
attribute_strap_type: Two short, rounded handles in pink, fixed and non-adjustable, attached with metal hardware.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Top closure, likely a zipper or magnetic snap, not fully visible but implied by the structure.
attribute_decorative_elements: Floral print, metallic hardware on handle attachments, front logo patch.
attribute_pattern: Floral pattern in pink and white on the main body, solid gray on side panels.
